calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Default Judgment (Prove-Up Hearing); Req. For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Susan Crozier #4761

Thomas R. Phinney, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Wachovia Bank, a division of Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Mark S. Tsang and Freeda N. Wong.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Principal $150,000.00
Late charges of $8,185.24
Interest $20,006.25
Attorneys' Fees $2,325.00
Costs $602.65 for a total judgment in the amount of $181,119.14
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2012 Continued To Nov-14-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2012 Continued To May-11-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
